title: integrator
description: Analog integrator / loop compensator. Modelled as a simulator-agnostic IDEAL behavioural block (out = clamp(initial + gain·∫(in − reference)dt, outputLow, outputHigh)) — a control-computing primitive rather than a parametric part catalog. The presence of the 'integrator' field at the top level discriminates the family. Pins: in, out.

behavioral.title: integratorBehavioral
behavioral.description: out = clamp(initial + gain·∫(V(in) − reference)dt, outputLow, outputHigh).

reference.description: Setpoint subtracted from the input before integrating.
